channel.title: HackerNews 日本語まとめ & AI要約
channel.description: HackerNewsのトップ記事を毎日日本語翻訳・AI要約して配信

item.title: 2026年6月15日（23:00取得） HackerNews トップ記事
item.description: #1 No, everyone is not using AI for everything #2 The Birth and Death of JavaScript (2014) #3 Firewood Splitting Simulator #4 Lisp's Influence on Ruby #5 Caddy compatibility for zeroserve: 3x throughput and 70% lower latency #6 FarOutCompany #7 Measles surge in Utah sparks fears US could undo decades of progress #8 The only scalable delete in Postgres is DROP TABLE #9 Rio de Janeiro's city government model Rio3.5 beats Qwen3.7 in recent benchmarks #10 Perlisisms

item.title: 2026年6月15日（07:00取得） HackerNews トップ記事
item.description: #1 Show HN: Kage – Shadow any website to a single binary for offline viewing #2 Rio de Janeiro's "homegrown" LLM appears to be a merge of an existing model #3 Did Anthropic ask for this? #4 Firewood Splitting Simulator #5 Chaosnet (1981) #6 AI is code – and can't be prompted into being smarter #7 Show HN: Trace – Offline Mac meeting transcripts you can flag mid-call #8 Ask HN: What are you working on? (June 2026) #9 Segmented type appreciation corner (2018) #10 Formal methods and the future of programming
